dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHAT ARE YOU DOING? WHY AREN'T YOU FIGHTING?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHOEVER WINS GETS THEIR NUDE PIC DELETED, SO THEY HAVE ONE OF HIM TOO. They AREN'T FIGHTING. Hmph; BORING.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hm, FINE; LET'S MAKE IT INTERESTING. Hmph!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: IF HOLE WINS, NO MORE SERVING US.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHAT? WOW~ HOLE WOULD LOVE THAT. Good for him.

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Original Body)
dialogue.line: REALLY?! IF I JUST BEAT HIM, I CAN ESCAPE! I CAN ESCAPE!

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Original Body)
dialogue.line: TAKE THIS!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Superman! FIGHTING! HIT HIM AGAIN! LOL! Slap, slip! DAMN! LOL! FUNNY! But...

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: I CAN FEEL HIS DESPERATION.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: LET'S JUST LET HIM WIN!

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Original Body)
dialogue.line: I GET HIT DAILY ANYWAYS.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: TIBBY! WHY ARE YOU JUST STANDING THERE? SHALL I UPLOAD IT ON SNS? LOL! So CUTE! Hole! PUNCH! ENOUGH!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hek? MIND YOUR OWN BUSINESS. TAKE A HIKE. Huh? THAT'S...

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: DON'T INTERFERE OR YOU'LL BE SORRY. LOL! ELNTAE Lee!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: The ARCHITECTURE CLASS prez! MIGHTY VASCO!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HEY, THAT'S THAT VASCO. WOW, HE'S MY STYLE! ISN'T EVERYONE? WHAT THE?! THAT VASCO? The ARCHITECTURE CLASS prez? NOW WHAT? THAT'S... VASCO. Wh- WHAT'S GOING ON?

dialogue.speaker: Vasco
dialogue.line: Heh! DOOM! YOU GUYS ARE BAD GUYS!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: SORRY! LET ME DOWN!

dialogue.speaker: Vasco
dialogue.line: YOU WANT TO GET HIT TOO? WANNA HEAD HOME?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: N-NO!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: YEAH!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Um, SORRY.

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Original Body)
dialogue.line: NAH, FORGET IT. I SURVIVED! YOU GUYS BETTER START WORKING UP!

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Original Body)
dialogue.line: THANKS VASCO. WHAT A GOOD GUY!

dialogue.speaker: Vasco
dialogue.line: YOU KNOW ME? YOU FROM OUR SCHOOL?

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Original Body)
dialogue.line: YEP, THE FASHION DEPARTMENT.

dialogue.speaker: Vasco
dialogue.line: FASHION? THAT'S THE TRANSFER STUDENT'S CLASS, RIGHT?

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Original Body)
dialogue.line: YEP!

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Original Body)
dialogue.line: SO THIS GUY'S IN THE SAME CLASS AS ME. THAT'S ME. THE ONE WHO KNOCKED DOWN ZACK?

dialogue.speaker: Vasco
dialogue.line: YEP!

dialogue.speaker: Vasco
dialogue.line: TELL THE NEW GUY, DON'T SCREW AROUND.

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Original Body)
dialogue.line: DON'T CRY. BETTER NOT SCREW AROUND. OKAY.

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Original Body)
dialogue.line: SO THE RUMORS ARE TRUE. HE PROTECTS THE WEAKLINGS, HATES THE COOL KIDS. 'ROBIN HOOD.'

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: AND THAT'S HOW I MET VASCO.

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Original Body)
dialogue.line: YEAH, ALMOST ALL SET. JUST NEED ONE MORE. SETTING FOR FOLD... EEK! IT'S FALLING!

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Original Body)
dialogue.line: YEAH, ALMOST DONE.

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Original Body)
dialogue.line: WHEW, ALL DONE. WHEN DO I EAT?

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: THERE'S SOMETHING IN THE AIR. THEN OBVIOUSLY...

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: THE NEW GUY HAS COME! Eh? THE GUY FROM YESTERDAY! DANNY? LET'S EAT TOGETHER~

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HE'S GOT QUITE THE PRESENCE!

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Attractive Body)
dialogue.line: I THINK HE'S COMING UP TO ME. SAME CLASS, RIGHT?

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Original Body)
dialogue.line: LET'S EAT TOGETHER. GOOD TO MEET YOU.

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Attractive Body)
dialogue.line: Hulk?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHAT? WHY HIM? CRAZY! JEALOUS~

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Original Body)
dialogue.line: Hey, PATSY, WHERE DO YOU LIVE? LET'S BE FRIENDS.

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Attractive Body)
dialogue.line: WHY'S HE THERE? Hmph.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: MUST BE LOOKING OUT FOR HIM~ HEART OF GOLD~

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Attractive Body)
dialogue.line: IS HE TRYING TO MAKE ME LOOK BAD? WOW- IS IT HIM?!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: THE GUY WHO TOOK DOWN ZACK?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HERE! YEP!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHO SAID THAT?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HE'S PRETTY.

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Attractive Body)
dialogue.line: I'M BETTER LOOKING, RIGHT?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WOW, HE'S HANDSOME. TAKE OFF YOUR SUNGLASSES!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: VOCAL/DANCE DEPT?! IT'S VIN JIN!

dialogue.speaker: Vin Jin
dialogue.line: I HEARD YOU LOST TO THAT PRETTY BOY, ZACK. YOU DRAG AROUND THESE UGLY CHARACTERS, LOL.

dialogue.speaker: Zack
dialogue.line: I LOOK GOOD! WELL, I LOST TO THE PRETTY BOY, BUT I COULD PROBABLY TAKE YOU. AND THE RATS YOU HANG WITH AREN'T NORMAL EITHER. YOU STINK!

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Attractive Body)
dialogue.line: WHY ME?

dialogue.speaker: Vin Jin
dialogue.line: HEY, YOU WANNA DIE?

dialogue.speaker: Zack
dialogue.line: TRY ME.

dialogue.speaker: Vin Jin
dialogue.line: YEP, HE'S FAST. IF HE REALLY HAD TRIED TO HIT ME...

dialogue.speaker: Zack
dialogue.line: I WOULD HAVE THROWN HIM AWAY!

dialogue.speaker: Vin Jin
dialogue.line: I WOULD HAVE BEEN CAUGHT BY HIM IF I HAD HIT HIM.

dialogue.speaker: Zack
dialogue.line: WHAT? FIGHT? BETTER KNOCK HIM OUT WITH ONE SHOT.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: He, he's ALWAYS BUSY. ZACK LEE AND VIN JIN TOGETHER. SCARY. WOW. DANNY, TRY THIS. WHAT? FIGHT?

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Attractive Body)
dialogue.line: ZACK AND VIN? Klk? WHAT?!

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Attractive Body)
dialogue.line: THAT GUY? ARCHITECTURE DEPT. IT'S VASCO. HE SAVED ME YESTERDAY!

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Attractive Body)
dialogue.line: VASCO! MAY THE BEST MAN WIN! I GOTTA SAY HI!

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Attractive Body)
dialogue.line: AH, SHOOT! HE DOESN'T RECOGNIZE ME!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: THAT'S THE NEW GUY.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HMM... MAYBE HE'S PICKING A FIGHT?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: THE LITTLE GUY FROM YESTERDAY.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WITH THAT TRAMP NEXT TO HIM. FEELS LIKE THE EYE OF THE STORM. YUCK, LOOK AT THAT MUSTACHE. IS HE DRAGGING AROUND THE WEAKLINGS?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HANDSOME GUYS ARE... ALWAYS BAD!

dialogue.speaker: Vasco
dialogue.line: AH, HEY!

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Attractive Body)
dialogue.line: WHO ARE YOU? YOU KNOW ME?

dialogue.speaker: Vasco
dialogue.line: YOU'VE NEVER BEEN TAKEN DOWN, HUH? YOU... WHAT'S THIS? DIFFERENT VIBE FROM YESTERDAY. HM.

dialogue.speaker: Vasco
dialogue.line: EVEN IF YOU'RE GOOD-LOOKING AND STRONG...

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: DON'T SCREW AROUND. Look! THERE IT IS! Squeeze!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: THE SQUEEZE OF DEATH! STRONG BUT STUPID! IT'S OVER! HE GRABBED HIS SHOULDER! WE WERE BROUGHT TO OUR KNEES!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: LOOK, HE'S SO STRONG.

dialogue.speaker: Vasco
dialogue.line: YEAH, HE'S NEVER SEEN ME BEFORE.

dialogue.speaker: Vasco
dialogue.line: HE'S WITHSTANDING IT. MOST GUYS ARE ALREADY ON THEIR KNEES. HE MUST'VE THOUGHT I WAS MEAN! LET'S CLEAR THE AIR!

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Attractive Body)
dialogue.line: S-SORRY.

dialogue.speaker: Vasco
dialogue.line: SORRY IF I BOTHERED YOU. I THOUGHT YOU WERE SOMEONE ELSE.

dialogue.speaker: Daniel (Attractive Body)
dialogue.line: KLK? WHAT THE?!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: VASCO'S GRIP? HE SHOOK IT OFF?! WITH ONE HAND?!

dialogue.speaker: Vin Jin
dialogue.line: Heh! I DID HEAR HE WAS FASTER THAN ZACK. BUT HE IS THIS STRONG?!

summary: The episode begins with Daniel's original body being forced into a fight, which is interrupted by Vasco, who is revealed to be a 'Robin Hood' figure. Later, Daniel (in his attractive body) encounters Vasco, Zack, and Vin Jin at school, leading to a tense confrontation where Vasco tests Daniel's unexpected strength.
